name: Cauliflower and Potato Curry (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a crockpot.
2. Cook on low for approximately six hours.
3. If adding wheat berries, cook them first on high with an additional cup of water for one hour.
4. After cooking the wheat berries, add the remaining ingredients and continue cooking on low.
5. If the mixture becomes too dry during the cooking process, add more water as needed.
